module_context.name: User Interfaces
module_context.description: Patient and practitioner facing applications including patient-facing web app, triage interview interface, and clinic practitioner review interface
module_context.safety_class_rationale: User interfaces for clinical data collection and display. Human factors failures could contribute to patient harm through incorrect data entry, misinterpretation of clinical information, or failure to display critical urgency indicators.

software_items.name: patient-ui
software_items.description: React/TypeScript micro-frontend monorepo providing patient-facing web application for triage interviews, appointments, chat, video consultations, and consent management

software_items.name: triage-ui
software_items.description: React/TypeScript frontend microfrontend providing the patient-facing interview UI for symptom triage

software_items.name: triage-clinic-ui
software_items.description: React-based microfrontend for practitioners to review triage results, view clinical flags, search conditions, and access patient data

core_functionalities.name: Patient Authentication and Session Management
core_functionalities.description: Manages patient authentication, session tokens, and authorization

core_functionalities.name: Symptom Interview Conduct
core_functionalities.description: Presents questions to patients and collects symptom data through various input types

core_functionalities.name: Patient Consent Management
core_functionalities.description: Manages patient consent for treatment and data processing

core_functionalities.name: Appointment and Booking Management
core_functionalities.description: Enables patients to book, view, and cancel appointments

core_functionalities.name: Practitioner Triage Review
core_functionalities.description: Displays triage results and clinical flags to practitioners

core_functionalities.name: Patient Search and Identification
core_functionalities.description: Enables practitioners to search and select patients

core_functionalities.name: Real-time Communication
core_functionalities.description: WebSocket-based real-time updates for chat and status

module_hazards.description: Patient enters incorrect symptom data due to confusing UI
module_hazards.potential_harm: Incorrect triage recommendation based on wrong symptom data, delaying appropriate care
module_hazards.cross_item_impact: Incorrect data propagates to triage engine

module_hazards.description: Patient skips critical question without realizing importance
module_hazards.potential_harm: Incomplete symptom data leading to inadequate triage assessment
module_hazards.cross_item_impact: Incomplete data affects rule engine evaluation

module_hazards.description: Network error during interview causes data loss
module_hazards.potential_harm: Patient must re-enter data, potential for inconsistent answers or abandonment
module_hazards.cross_item_impact: Affects both interview UI and host application

module_hazards.potential_harm: Treatment without valid consent or denial of needed care

module_hazards.description: Authentication token expiry causes session loss during critical operation
module_hazards.potential_harm: Patient loses interview progress, data submitted without proper authentication

module_hazards.description: Triage result or clinical flag not displayed to practitioner
module_hazards.potential_harm: Practitioner unaware of critical flags, inappropriate care decisions

module_hazards.description: Clinical flag displayed with incorrect content
Wrong patient data displayed to practitioner
module_hazards.potential_harm: Treatment decisions based on wrong patient information
Practitioner overlooks urgent recommendation, delayed treatment
module_hazards.cross_item_impact: Human factors issue affecting time-sensitive care

module_hazards.description: UI crash leaves user unable to complete workflow
module_hazards.potential_harm: Patient cannot complete triage, practitioner cannot access results

module_hazards.description: Redux state persistence failure causes session data loss
module_hazards.potential_harm: Patient session exposed to XSS or session data lost on browser refresh

failure_modes.name: JWT token expiry during active session
failure_modes.effect_on_system: Patient session terminated, in-progress operations lost

failure_modes.name: Authorization redirect loop
failure_modes.effect_on_module: Browser shows too many redirects error

failure_modes.name: Network request timeout during answer submission
failure_modes.effect_on_module: Answer not saved, error reported to host

failure_modes.name: Patient accidentally navigates away
failure_modes.effect_on_module: CancellationModal displayed, data loss if confirmed

failure_modes.name: Consent API returns success but data not persisted
failure_modes.effect_on_module: UI indicates success but consent not recorded

failure_modes.name: Appointment cancellation notification fails
failure_modes.effect_on_module: API call succeeds but practitioner not notified

failure_modes.name: API timeout on triage result fetch
failure_modes.effect_on_module: Triage panel shows no data or partial data
failure_modes.effect_on_system: Practitioner may not realize data is incomplete

failure_modes.name: Backend returns malformed triage result JSON
failure_modes.effect_on_module: Component may fail to render or display incorrect data

failure_modes.name: Critical urgency flag not visually prominent
failure_modes.effect_on_module: Flags rendered with equal visual weight

failure_modes.name: Incorrect patient selected from search results
failure_modes.effect_on_module: Triage results for wrong patient displayed

failure_modes.name: WebSocket connection timeout
failure_modes.effect_on_module: Real-time updates cease, fallback to polling

module_risk_controls.description: JWT token validation on application initialization
module_risk_controls.implementation: initAuth checks token expiry and triggers logout if expired
useWebsockets implements fallback intervals on connection loss

module_risk_controls.description: Global error boundary with analytics reporting
module_risk_controls.implementation: ReactErrorBoundary catches errors, logs to analytics

module_risk_controls.description: Numeric input validation with min/max constraints
module_risk_controls.implementation: InputNumber enforces min/max and displays error messages

module_risk_controls.description: Exit warning modal to prevent accidental data loss
Answer status tracking prevents premature progression
module_risk_controls.implementation: isReadyToProceed checks if question answered before allowing Next

module_risk_controls.description: Null/empty data checks before rendering triage results
module_risk_controls.implementation: Components check for empty data before rendering

module_risk_controls.description: Axios interceptor for network error detection and logging
module_risk_controls.implementation: Interceptor detects timeout and network errors, logs to analytics

module_risk_controls.description: Minimum query length validation for patient search
ARIA attributes for accessibility and error indication
module_risk_controls.implementation: aria-invalid, aria-describedby on inputs for screen reader feedback

module_risk_controls_required_upstream.description: Patient training on interview process and symptom reporting
module_risk_controls_required_upstream.rationale: UI cannot force patient to understand medical terminology

module_risk_controls_required_upstream.description: Clinician review process to catch incomplete symptom data
module_risk_controls_required_upstream.rationale: UI cannot validate truthfulness of patient-entered data

module_risk_controls_required_upstream.description: Practitioner training on triage UI interpretation
module_risk_controls_required_upstream.rationale: Software displays information but cannot ensure correct interpretation

module_risk_controls_required_upstream.description: Patient identity verification procedure independent of software
module_risk_controls_required_upstream.rationale: Software cannot verify physical patient matches selected record

module_risk_controls_required_upstream.description: Backend must verify consent persistence and return confirmation
module_risk_controls_required_upstream.rationale: Frontend cannot directly access consent database

cross_item_interfaces.name: Triage-UI embedded in Patient-UI
cross_item_interfaces.safety_impact: Triage-UI errors propagate to Patient-UI error boundary. State must be coordinated between host and microfrontend.
cross_item_interfaces.data_exchanged: Interview state, error callbacks, origin configuration
cross_item_interfaces.failure_handling: Error boundary catches triage-ui errors, reports to host

cross_item_interfaces.name: Backend API Integration
cross_item_interfaces.safety_impact: All UIs depend on backend APIs. Failures affect patient workflow and practitioner access.
cross_item_interfaces.data_exchanged: Interview data, triage results, appointments, consents
cross_item_interfaces.failure_handling: React Query error handling, toast notifications

cross_item_interfaces.name: WebSocket Real-time Updates
cross_item_interfaces.safety_impact: Real-time updates for chat and status. Failure delays information delivery.
cross_item_interfaces.data_exchanged: Status changes, chat messages, appointment updates

module_verification_gaps.description: Error propagation between triage-ui and patient-ui not tested
module_verification_gaps.recommendation: Add integration tests for error boundary behavior across microfrontend boundary

module_verification_gaps.description: WebSocket fallback mechanism not covered by unit tests
module_verification_gaps.recommendation: Add tests for connection loss scenarios and fallback behavior

module_verification_gaps.description: Null/empty data checks in triage clinic UI lack unit tests
module_verification_gaps.recommendation: Add tests verifying components return null when data empty

module_verification_gaps.description: Interview ID correlation logic in clinic UI not verified
module_verification_gaps.recommendation: Add tests verifying flags match interview IDs

module_verification_gaps.description: No test for partial API failure in triage result fetch
module_verification_gaps.recommendation: Add test where some interviews succeed and others fail

module_verification_gaps.description: Urgency indicator visibility not tested with actual practitioners
module_verification_gaps.recommendation: Conduct usability testing for urgency indicator prominence

module_verification_gaps.description: Only 52 test files for 671+ TypeScript source files in patient-ui
module_verification_gaps.recommendation: Establish systematic unit testing with 80%+ coverage for safety-critical modules

aggregation_summary.notes: Multi-item module with critical human factors concerns. Wrong patient data display (catastrophic) and urgency indicator visibility are primary safety concerns. Low test coverage in patient-ui is a significant gap.
